# Template Skill

Use this skill as a starting point for a reusable Copilot workflow.

## When to Use

- The same process is repeated often
- The workflow has clear steps
- You want a consistent format for future tasks

## Instructions

1. Replace this template with the real workflow.
2. Keep the steps concrete and verifiable.
3. Include any required file paths, checks, or output expectations.
